title: Replace footer social icon with WhatsApp logo and link

requirements.summary: Replace the third social media icon in the Footer component with a WhatsApp logo linking to the specified WhatsApp channel
acceptanceCriteria: The third social icon in the footer is now the WhatsApp logo (recognizable green telephone-in-bubble icon using standard WhatsApp SVG path).
Clicking the icon opens https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb8BEFtFXUuarLwqVs0C in a new browser tab.
The icon size and hover styling are consistent with the other social media icons in the same row.
No other footer icons or links are changed.

file_operations.description: Replace the third social media link's SVG icon with the WhatsApp logo SVG (standard telephone-in-bubble design with green color on hover). Update the link's href to https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb8BEFtFXUuarLwqVs0C and ensure it opens in a new tab with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'. Match the icon size (likely w-5 h-5 or w-6 h-6) and hover effects (color transitions) with the existing social icons. Preserve all other social links and footer sections unchanged.
